description: Provides the Java EE Enterprise JavaBeans API classes and annotations for declaring and interacting with EJB components. It defines contracts between enterprise beans, their clients, and the EJB container, including sessions, messages, timers, transactions, interceptors, and embeddable-container integration.

Provides the Java EE 6 Enterprise JavaBeans 3.1 API classes and annotations for declaring and interacting with EJB components. It defines contracts between enterprise beans, their clients, and the EJB container, including session beans, message-driven beans, timers, transactions, interceptors, and embeddable-container support.
